effects.effect: Discard the top 2 cards of both players' Decks.

effects.name: Healing Hand
effects.effect: Once per turn: you can discard 1 card from your hand or rest this Vivosaur; all Vivosaurs you control heal 50 LP.

effects.name: Lambeo Combo
effects.effect: Flip a coin, if heads: apply Enrage to the defending Vivosaur.

effects.name: Counting Coup
effects.effect: Flip a coin, if heads: apply Excite to the defending Vivosaur.
